title: Unauthorized error when updating WordPress category
symptom: When attempting to update a category in WordPress via an HTTP request, a 401 error occurs with the message 'Sorry, you are not allowed to edit this term.'
applies_when: Using HTTP Request node to update a WordPress category
Using standard login credentials for authentication
root_cause: The error occurs because WordPress requires the use of Application Passwords for API authentication when performing actions that modify data, such as updating categories. Standard login credentials do not provide the necessary permissions.
fix_steps: Go to your WordPress User Profile
Use this Application Password to authenticate the n8n WordPress node instead of your regular password
agent_instruction: Authenticate the WordPress node in n8n using an Application Password instead of your regular login password.
